title: lastrea scalaris
intro: Lastrea scalaris, also known as the silver fern or scalaris fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Lastrea scalaris include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reduced inflammation and improved wound healing, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil for topical application.
